message.content:
@startuml
actor "Specialist Doctor" as SD

participant ":CreateReportUI" as UI
participant ":CreateReportController" as Controller
participant ":Company" as Company
participant ":TestDiagnosis" as TestDiagnosis
participant "obj : diagnosis" as Diagnosis
participant "rp : TestReportStore" as TestReportStore
participant "rp : TestReport" as TestReport

SD -> UI : 1 asks to create a new diagnosis

ref over UI : US4_SD_testsDTO.puml

UI --> SD : 2 requests to choose a given test
SD -> UI : 3 chooses a given test

UI -> Controller : 4 createTestDiagnosis(idTest)
Controller -> Company : 5 createTestDiagnosis(test)
Company -> TestDiagnosis : 6 createTestDiagnosis(testParameterList)
create Diagnosis
TestDiagnosis --> Diagnosis : obj : diagnosis

Controller -> Company : 7 getDiagnosis()
Company --> Controller : 8 getDiagnosis()

Controller --> UI : 
UI --> SD : 9 shows the diagnosis done automatically and requests the data for the report
SD -> UI : 10 types the requested data

UI -> Controller : 11 createReport(idTest, diagnosis, report)
Controller -> Controller : 12 store = getTestReportStore()

Controller -> TestReportStore : 13 createReport(idTest, diagnosis, report)
TestReportStore -> TestReport : 14 create(idTest, diagnosis, report)
create TestReport

TestReportStore -> TestReport : 15 validateReport()
TestReport --> TestReportStore :

TestReportStore --> Controller :
Controller --> UI :
UI --> SD : 16 shows the typed data and asks for confirmation
SD -> UI : 17 confirms the data

UI -> Controller : 18 saveReport(report)
Controller -> TestReportStore : 19 saveReport(report)
TestReportStore -> TestReportStore : 20 saveReport(report)

TestReportStore -> TestReportStore : 21 validateReport(report)
TestReportStore -> TestReportStore : 22 addReport(report)

TestReportStore --> Controller :
Controller --> UI :
UI --> SD : 23 informs operation success

@enduml
